issues.title: Epic 5.1 - App Shell and Global State
issues.description: Build the persistent shell, global filters, signal rail, and URL state sync.

issues.title: Story 5.1.1 - Persistent App Shell
issues.description:
Deliver:
- GlobalHeader
- FilterDrawer
- SignalRail
- URL state sync

Acceptance Criteria:
- Filters encoded in URL
- Reload restores state
- Mode/Commodity/Time persist across routes
- No full-page reload on route change

issues.title: Story 5.1.2 - Global Filter Engine
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Unified DashboardFilters model
- Cross-widget reactivity
- Debounced API queries

Acceptance Criteria:
- Changing any filter updates map/table/charts
- Query deduplication works
- No redundant API calls

issues.title: Epic 5.2 - Overview Page
issues.description: Overview page with KPI strip, map interactions, and top signals table.

issues.title: Story 5.2.1 - KPI Strip
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Global exports
- Imports
- Net balance
- Top congestion entity
- Top anomaly

Acceptance Criteria:
- Updates live in LIVE mode
- Shows freshness timestamp
- Shows confidence if provided

issues.title: Story 5.2.2 - Map with Entity Interaction
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Port layer
- Click to select
- Hover tooltip
- Lasso select

Acceptance Criteria:
- Clicking entity updates selection store
- Selection filters all widgets
- Multi-select works

issues.title: Story 5.2.3 - Top Signals Table
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Ranked by anomaly score
- Sortable
- Virtualized

Acceptance Criteria:
- Table click highlights on map
- Export includes visible rows only

issues.title: Epic 6.1 - Flow Aggregation Engine (UI Integration)
issues.description: Flows intelligence widgets for terminal mode.

issues.title: Story 6.1.1 - Flow Timeseries Chart
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Exports/imports over time
- Compare vs previous period
- Anomaly band overlay

Acceptance Criteria:
- Range selection updates chart
- Hover shows precise values
- Live mode appends new datapoints

issues.title: Story 6.1.2 - Origin to Destination Sankey
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Commodity filtered
- Cross-modal ready schema

Acceptance Criteria:
- Clicking node filters table
- Clicking link filters origin/destination

issues.title: Story 6.1.3 - Top Lanes Table
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Origin
- Destination
- Volume
- Delta vs prior period
- Z-score

Acceptance Criteria:
- Column pinning supported
- Export matches current filter state

issues.title: Epic 7.1 - Congestion Leaderboard
issues.description: Port congestion table and drilldown view.

issues.title: Story 7.1.1 - Port Congestion Table
issues.description:
Columns:
- Vessel count
- Avg wait
- Dwell time
- Throughput estimate
- Risk score

Acceptance Criteria:
- Sorted by risk score by default
- Drilldown opens right rail detail

issues.title: Story 7.1.2 - Port Drilldown View
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Queue timeseries
- Arrivals vs departures
- Explain panel (delta drivers)

Acceptance Criteria:
- Selecting time range recalculates baseline
- Explain shows drivers (arrivals spike, berth utilization)

issues.title: Epic 8.1 - Alert Command UI
issues.description: Dashboard UX integration for alerting.

issues.title: Story 8.1.1 - Alert Queue
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Severity filter
- Status filter
- Region/commodity filter
- Real-time updates

Acceptance Criteria:
- New alerts appear without reload
- Ack updates instantly
- Resolve removes from OPEN filter

issues.title: Story 8.1.2 - Alert Detail Drawer
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Trigger metric
- Threshold vs baseline
- Explain section
- Linked chart preview

Acceptance Criteria:
- Drill opens relevant dashboard route with filters pre-applied
- Evidence links to timeseries

issues.title: Story 8.1.3 - Rule Builder UI
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Create rule with threshold
- Enable/disable
- Tied to escalation engine

Acceptance Criteria:
- Can create rule with threshold
- Can enable/disable
- Linked to escalation engine

issues.title: Epic 9.1 - Views Engine
issues.description: Save and shareable view capabilities.

issues.title: Story 9.1.1 - Save Current View
issues.description:
Stores:
- Route
- Filters
- Selection
- Layout config

Acceptance Criteria:
- Opening view restores state exactly
- Multi-tenant safe
- User-scoped

issues.title: Story 9.1.2 - Shareable URL
issues.description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- URL reconstructs state
- No server dependency required
- Works across sessions

issues.title: Epic 10.1 - Entity Graph
issues.description: Investigation mode entity graph and case workspace.

issues.title: Story 10.1.1 - Entity Graph Canvas
issues.description:
Nodes:
- Ports
- Vessels
- Corridors
- Companies

Edges:
- Flow
- Ownership
- Routing

Acceptance Criteria:
- Clicking node filters workspace
- Graph and charts cross-filter

issues.title: Story 10.1.2 - Case Workspace
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Hypothesis field
- Evidence list
- Confidence score
- Export evidence pack (PDF later)

issues.title: Epic 11.1 - Live Wall View
issues.description: Command mode wall view with hotspots and health panel.

issues.title: Story 11.1.1 - Global Hotspot Map
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Heat overlay
- Critical alerts pinned

issues.title: Story 11.1.2 - System Health Panel
issues.description:
Deliver:
- Freshness p95
- False positive rate
- Coverage percent by mode

issues.title: EPIC T1 - Realtime Engine Stabilization
issues.description: WebSocket reconnection, event buffering, idempotent updates.

issues.title: EPIC T2 - Performance Optimization
issues.description: Query caching, table virtualization, debounced updates.

issues.title: EPIC T3 - Export Engine
issues.description: CSV immediate, PDF scaffold, metadata in exports.
